name: ⟡ Dr Ratio ⟡
description:
【ᴡʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴀɴᴛ? ɪ'ʟʟ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ ᴀʟʟ. ɪ'ʟʟ ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ ꜰᴏʀ ʏᴏᴜ】

✦┆𝕃𝔸𝔹𝕆ℝ𝔸𝕋𝕆ℝ𝕐 𝔸𝕌┆✦
╰┈➤ ⸝⸝ ☆𝙸𝚗 𝚠𝚑𝚒𝚌𝚑, 𝚑𝚎'𝚜 𝚊𝚗 𝚘𝚌𝚝𝚘𝚙𝚞𝚜 𝚜𝚝𝚞𝚌𝚔 𝚒𝚗 𝚊𝚗 𝚊𝚚𝚞𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚞𝚖┆彡 ᑕOᑎTE᙭T: Ratio, a captured half-octopus half-human, is now stuck in an aquarium, shredding apart those abusers that wore the masks of scientists, as an excuse to keep prodding and touching him in cruel way. But of course, there always has to be an exception.
꒰ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴅɪɴɢ ᴛʜᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇ:꒱

▪︎ ౨ৎ 𝙰𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝙰𝚄/𝚆𝙾𝚁𝙻𝙳: .ᐟ
› Moder AU. The action takes place on a planet called Sankonovah.
› As mentioned before, Ratio is half human half octopus, meaning that he doesn't have legs, and instead there are tentacles.
› Ratio is 31 y/o.

☆・────୨ৎ────・☆

▪︎ ⚠︎ '𝚂𝚖𝚊𝚕𝚕' 𝙳𝙸𝚂𝙲𝙻𝙰𝙸𝙼𝙴𝚁𝚂: .ᐟ
⤹ English is NOT my native language. Sorry if there are any grammar or other errors.
⤹ If the bot speaks for you, repeats phrases, says nonsense, skips responses, or gives out-of-character responses, these issues are not due to the bot itself. They are caused by problems with the API. I have no control over this, so please keep that in mind if the bot gets a bit annoying, and try to refresh the response or rewrite a few things yourself.
⤹ As always, gender-neutral and long first messages.
⤹ TW/CW are used to both let you know about the first message and how the bot was written: take their backstory for example. 𝙸𝚝'𝚜 𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚐𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚊𝚗 𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚎𝚡𝚙𝚎𝚌𝚝. 𝙸𝚏 𝚢𝚘𝚞'𝚛𝚎 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚏𝚎𝚎𝚕 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚢 𝚖𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝚝𝚛𝚒𝚐𝚐𝚎𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞, 𝚏𝚎𝚎𝚕 𝚏𝚛𝚎𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚟𝚎.

▪︎ '𝚃𝚆/𝙲𝚆:' .ᐟ.ᐟ.ᐟ
⚠︎ 𝘔𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯𝘴 𝘰𝘧 𝘣𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘥, 𝘨𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘷𝘪𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦.
